execution_recommendation.reason: The remaining work is release hardening, workflow productization, and build hygiene across multiple repo surfaces with clear binary gates and limited safe parallel lanes.

tasks.title: Public mirror dry-run hardening
tasks.description: Validate the publishable Free export path end to end using the current mirror scripts, staging output, manifest, and release docs.
acceptanceCriteria: A reproducible dry-run path exists from private primary state to Free export staging output.
The dry run proves that only Free docs, Free tool surfaces, and allowed public assets are included.
The dry run is documented as an operational checklist or script sequence.
Dry-run failures are surfaced as binary gate failures.

tasks.title: Free public QA and messaging lock
tasks.description: Run a final consistency pass over Free-facing docs, scripts, tool surface, and release framing so the public story matches the actual Free export.
acceptanceCriteria: Free-facing docs do not promise Advanced or Studio behavior.
Public quickstart, root README, mirror docs, and release checklist are mutually consistent.
The Free tool list matches the actual Free registration path.
A short public artifact explains what Free includes and excludes.

tasks.title: TypeScript build exit anomaly resolution
tasks.description: Diagnose and resolve the recurring build hang so the normal mcp-server and root build paths terminate cleanly again.
acceptanceCriteria: The cause is identified and documented.
The build exits cleanly on the normal path.
Release and verification steps no longer rely on silent tolerance of hanging builds.
The outcome is captured in developer or release documentation.

tasks.title: Premium catalog enrichment
tasks.description: Expand the Advanced premium library into a more convincing paid catalog with stronger curation signals and richer usable inventory.
acceptanceCriteria: The premium library supports broader useful asset categories or metadata.
The catalog can express stronger curation signals instead of only raw entries.
Advanced docs and planner outputs reflect the richer premium layer.
Free remains unaffected and mirror-safe.

tasks.title: Advanced workflow depth hardening
tasks.description: Deepen the end-to-end value of the Advanced orchestration layer, especially around creator flows and critique/repair loops.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one Advanced workflow becomes measurably more end-to-end than the current orchestration.
Critique and repair guidance become more operational and less purely advisory.
Advanced workflow outputs are documented and tested as distinct from Free.
No Free path becomes dependent on Advanced orchestration.

tasks.title: Mirror publication automation handoff
tasks.description: Package the current Free mirror verification and preparation flow into a clear operational handoff for the Forgejo migration and public GitHub mirror process.
acceptanceCriteria: The runbook explicitly covers the Forgejo-primary to GitHub-mirror lifecycle.
Preconditions, commands, outputs, and failure gates are explicit.
The release gate command is treated as the canonical pre-publication check.
Another operator can execute the process without hidden context.

tasks.title: Final Studio deferment note
tasks.description: Lock a concise architecture note that explicitly defines what remains deferred to Studio and what must not leak into current Free or Advanced positioning.
acceptanceCriteria: Cloud library, cross-site storage, delivery orchestration, and team flows are explicitly marked deferred.
No current Free or Advanced document overclaims Studio behavior.
The deferment note references current entitlement and provider boundaries.
The note is short, clear, and aligned with the launch blueprint.
